feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Differences between S/4HANA Cloud PrivateEdition and Public Edition
entry.content:
Differences between S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and Public Edition

What is the most effective way to check the differences between S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

▪Things to check
・Differences in available modules
・Scope
・Limitations
・How to extend

Best regards,
YO-YO

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: How to create the Credit Management (SAP S/4HANA CLOUD 2408)
entry.content:
How to create the Advance Credit Management for S4hana Public Cloud

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: QM/PM_Master Inspection Characteristics assignment in General maintenance Task List_mass upload
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Could you please advise how to assign Master Inspection Characteristics (MIC) to General Maintenance Task List via mass upload. 

We had used Migration cockpit template General Maintenance Task List to upload Task List, however using this template we could not upload Master Inspection Characteristics (MIC) as this field is not available. 

Now, our requirement is to mass upload Master Inspection Characteristics (MIC) assigned to Task List Group in IA06 Transaction.  

Could you please advise whether any option is available for this in SAP Standard or any SAP upload tools should be used for this.

Thank you,

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Temporary servers for upgrade projects in S/4HANA Cloud private edition
entry.content:
Hi, all

We are approaching the time when we need to upgrade older version of S/4HANA, and we are considering the best approach.

We understand the scope of services provided by ECS and CAS, but we would like to know about the costs and procedures related to the temporary servers(sandbox system) needed during the upgrade project.

  1. If we subscribe to CAS and proceed with the project, does the CAS package include the provision of temporary servers?
  2. If we proceed with the project by requesting ECS services only, how do we request temporary servers? Additionally, will there be separate charges for the temporary server usage?

Best Regards,

entry.title: RISE Base Option VPN amount
entry.content:
Hi SAP team

 

Colud you please clarify how many S2S VPNs does the customer right under RISE private cloud base option?

As per my intepretation of R&R document, customer can deploy 5 S2S VPN, however I will appreciate your clarification

 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: When uploading bank statements, error: Currency USD not permitted in account / 1234567890
entry.content:
Let's assume the following situation: You upload a bank statement file into your system. It contains two statements (or more).

Statement one is for bank account 0987654321 which has the currency configured in EUR in the Manage Bank Accounts master data app.

Statement two is for bank account 1234567890 which has the currency USD. 

Now suddenly you see the error message in the log and the upload fails.

entry.title: Rise(private edition) have HANA HA(system replication) by default?
entry.content:
Hi all,

Rise(Private edition) have HANA HA(system replication) by default? or SAP just talk about SLA? 

Because when we login to customer Rise production system, we cannot check any HANA HA(system replication) setting & status 

thanks 

John

entry.title: Flexible workflow: Recipients cannot be edited (The recipients are determined automatically.)
entry.content:
Flexible workflow: Recipients cannot be edited.

Previously I could edit the recipients of a workflow, but now I get the message “The recipients are determined automatically.”, and it does not allow to edit the recipients.
What can I do to make the recipients editable?

entry.title: Target field exposure for Substitution rule in F4406 for journal entries
entry.content:
I am interested to know what the recommended approach is for Managing and creating substitution rules in SAP S/4HANA Private cloud. 

There is access to ggb1, but this only exposes tables and fields on the old tables and not ACDOCA.

There is also the possibility to create new rules under the fiori app F4406 Manage Validations and Substitution rules, which it appears the new way and pointing to ACODCA. 

The target fields under F4406 seem to be limited and I can't find the relevant configuration to extend these for other existing standard fields such as G/L Account.

Any guidance on this will be appreciated.

Please note that I have been referring to documentation in here https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/651d8af3ea974ad1a4d74449122c620e/1ec5d4ccf09646c7b720ac55adb5ef4a.html?locale=en-US&q=manage+validation/substitution+rules+for+journal+entries but have not found relevancy information on my question above.

entry.title: On-prem SAP S/4hana to RISE with SAP S/4HANA cloud private DNS options
entry.content:
Hi,

During Migration it is mandatory to have DNS available at On-Premise. 

If the Customer end is not having any DNS installed then what are the available options for fulfill the DNS requirement.

Regards

Niten

entry.title: Object SFPF(Adobe Form) is not allowed in ABAP Cloud Development. What's the alternate of it?
entry.content:
I encounter a message while trying run ATC check with 'ABAP_CLOUD_READINESS' that neither Adobe Form nor Smartforms are allowed in ABAP Cloud Development.

I would like to know what's the alternate of forms in ABAP Clean Core approach.

entry.title: General ledger distribution and assessment
entry.content:
Hi,

As I have different allocation portions between Local and group GAAP, I need to make distribution and assessment to general ledger level. I found a solution with transactions FAGLGA11 & FAGLGA31 but I read that those transactions are going to be deprecated in the SAP S/4HANA latest versions. Does anyone know how can I do it with new transactions? I have tried with KSV1 & KSU1 but I can not choose the ledger so they are not useful for me. 

Regards,
Ale.

entry.title: Effect of changing password for job user?
entry.content:
Dear Experts!

I would like to confirm one thing regarding the users we use for executing jobs on SAP private cloud system.

Due to password policy change, I will have to update password for users currently used for executing jobs. I am concerned about the effect it might have on job execution after updating the password.

Would it cause any issues like job cancellation or error if I change the password? All of the users are system users.

Additionally, there is a user named "BATCH_USER" in our system that is also responsible for execution of some jobs but I am not able to see the user in SU10. Is it a special user that does not require password change?

thank you in advance.

Fujita

entry.title: Extension while delivery creation to change item weights and dimensions before route determination
entry.content:
Hello experts,

we are using S/4HANA and have to change weights and dimensions for our configured products on item level while creating deliveries. As different weights may impact route determination, we cannot use most common user exits (Include MV50AFZ1 or BAdI LE_SHP_DELIVERY_PROC) because route has already been determinated when processing them.

Therefore we need an extension where to change item data BEFORE route is determined.

Can anyone help?

Kind regards
Peter Schmidt

entry.title: Hyperscaler / ECS BACKUP SOLUTION / COHESITY
entry.content:
Hello,

according to the SAP_Enterprise_Cloud_Services_Backups.pdf guide, the backup files (full and log) are moved from the source server to the hyperscaler storage in Azure, for example.
How long does the data remain on the source server and at what frequency is the data moved to the hyperscaler storage and transferred to Cohesity?

THX

entry.title: Event consumption model for custom RAP events created on S/4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Looking for a way to consume custom RAP events created on S/4HANA Private Cloud or On-Premise in BTP ABAP Environment using Event Consumption Model.

1. Creating custom RAP events

2. Event consumption model for standard S/4HANA events using AsyncAPI on BTP ABAP environment - Step 4 onwards. AsyncAPI/Event metadata for released events can be downloaded from api.sap.com

My question is how can I generate the event metadata/AsyncAPI file for custom RAP events in S/4HANA Private Cloud to be able to use the event consumption model in BTP ABAP environment. I know it is possible to generate the event metadata for RAP events in S/4HANA Public Cloud - Steps 1 to 3, but is this possible on Private cloud. If not how can we consume custom RAP events from private cloud in SAP BTP ABAP environment?

Best Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: SAP Event Mesh - Creating and triggering non-RAP custom events from S/4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it possible to create and trigger non-RAP custom enterprise events from S/4HANA Private Cloud preferably through ABAP? If so, how can it be achieved and can we generate an event metadata/AsyncAPI file for such custom events for use in Event Consumption Model on BTP ABAP environment?

Best Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: 如何实现销售出库交货单过账后按行项目冲销
entry.content: 当前，我们只能用vl09对整张销售出库交货单进行冲销，但是因为一些原因，我们希望能够实现销售出库交货单过账后能够按行项目进行冲销。请问如何实现？

entry.title: [COF]SAP systems deployed in different subnets
entry.content:
Hi,

There is a question in the COF below. Could you please explain specifically what it means?

Why do you ask whether to deploy systems on different subnets?

Do you want to have your SAP systems deployed in different subnets? If yes, your CAA will get in touch with you to work out the details

Best regards,

Arakawa

entry.title: Rental server for SAP S/4HANA Cloud version up
entry.content:
I would like to rent two sandbox servers to verify the upgrade of SAP S/4HANA Cloud for the S/4HANA upgrade project.
Is it possible to rent multiple servers as follows?
1. Rent server A for six months.
On server A, copy the system from the production system and perform the S/4HANA upgrade.
2. Rent server B for five months, starting from the month following the rental period of server A.
As with server A, copy the system from the production system and upgrade S/4HANA.
